en: At first, the child may wake in the middle of the night,

zh: 可能在半睡半醒狀態下回到父母的房間、
en: and drift back to the parents' room half-asleep.

zh: 如果他同意父母抱他回自己的房間、
en: If they agree to be carried back to their own room,

zh: 父母即刻抱他回自己的房間床上、
en: parents should take them back right away.

zh: 則等待孩子熟睡後再抱吧!
en: wait until they're deeply asleep, and then carry them back.
